About Us

A Peaceful Himalayan
Retreat for Every Traveller

Krrish Residency offers a warm, comfortable stay amidst the beauty of the Himalayas. Whether you're visiting for leisure, pilgrimage, or adventure, our well-furnished rooms, open balconies, and stunning mountain views make for an unforgettable experience. We pride ourselves on cleanliness, hospitality, and value for money.

Mountain View Balconies
Modern Furnished Rooms
Family & Triple Rooms
Open Corridors & Seating
Festival Lighting & Decor
24/7 Availability
Easy Road Access
Warm Hospitality

Accommodations

Comfortable Rooms for Every Stay

From cosy doubles to spacious family rooms — all thoughtfully furnished for your comfort.

Standard

Deluxe Double Room

A well-appointed room with comfortable double bed, warm wooden furniture, dressing area and attached bathroom. Perfect for couples or solo travellers.

Double BedAttached BathStorageFan

Family

Triple / Family Room

Spacious room with one double and two single beds, ideal for families or small groups. Warm lighting, dressing area and comfortable bedding provided.

1 Double + 2 SingleWall LightingMirrorFan

Premium

Mountain View Room

Wake up to misty Himalayan valleys and fresh pine-scented air. Open balcony with seating makes every morning memorable.

Valley ViewOpen BalconyOutdoor SeatingModern Decor
